name: Capitulation reclaim
desc: Deep dump + high vol + EMA20 reclaim proxy → long mean-rev

name: Failed bounce
desc: Bear regime + weak rebound into EMA50 → short pullback

name: Quiet bull squeeze
desc: Bull regime + compressed drift + vol pop → long breakout

name: Overextended below 200
desc: Macro bear + sharp pop + RSI warm → fade squeeze

name: Bear-trap impulse
desc: Below EMA50 but improving 5-bar + vol confirm → long reversal probe

name: Bull-trap rollover
desc: Above EMA50 but negative impulse + vol confirm → short reversal probe

name: L laggard breakout + vol
desc: Below EMA50, bull stack, 5b thrust, vol confirm → catch late breakout.

name: S failed bounce + vol
desc: Bear stack, over EMA20, weak ret20, vol → bounce failure.

name: L bull-regime washout
desc: Above EMA200, sharp 5b dump, low RSI → panic dip mean rev.

name: S bear-regime euphoria
desc: Below EMA200, fast squeeze, high RSI → fade relief spike.

name: L hidden-strength div proxy
desc: RSI firm, price still under EMA20, ret20 positive → accumulation.

name: S hidden-weakness div proxy
desc: RSI weak, price still over EMA20, ret20 negative → distribution.

name: Bull re-accel
desc: bull stack, shallow premium, 5b impulse, vol confirm

name: Bull trap fade
desc: above EMA20, RSI hot, 5b flips red, vol hit

name: Capitulation snap
desc: deep under EMA200, 20b washout, 5b reclaim, panic vol

name: EMA20 rejection
desc: bear stack, weak pop over EMA20 fails, RSI capped

name: Stealth divergence proxy
desc: 20b downtrend, RSI midline reclaim, low-vol seller exhaustion

name: Range breakdown
desc: below EMA200, tight under EMA50, 5b dump, vol expansion

name: Bull div proxy
desc: ret20 down, RSI holds, ret5 turn

name: Bear div proxy
desc: ret20 up, RSI fades, ret5 rolls

name: EMA200 reclaim
desc: 200 reclaim + vol + RSI mid

name: EMA200 loss
desc: 200 loss + vol + RSI soft

name: Quiet bull PB
desc: bull stack, above 50, low-vol flush

name: Quiet bear relief
desc: bear stack, below 50, low-vol bounce

name: Capitulation vol snap long
desc: Panic extension + vol climax → mean-revert bounce

name: Euphoric exhaustion short
desc: Overextended impulse + crowded vol → fade

name: Bear-trap EMA20 reclaim
desc: Bear stack yet px reclaims EMA20 + RSI mid → squeeze probe

name: Bull-trap EMA20 loss
desc: Bull stack yet px loses EMA20 + RSI fades → liquidation probe

name: Bull divergence proxy
desc: 20b downtrend but 5b turn + RSI recovery above oversold → reversal

name: Bear divergence proxy
desc: 20b uptrend but 5b roll + RSI loss below neutral → reversal

name: Neutral reclaim + vol
desc: Stack flat; EMA50 reclaim + 5b thrust + vol → breakout long

name: Neutral loss + vol
desc: Stack flat; EMA50 loss + 5b dump + vol → breakdown short

name: Bull under20 rehook
desc: Above EMA200; under EMA20; 5b turn + RSI regain → pullback long

name: Bear over20 fail
desc: Below EMA200; over EMA20; 5b roll + RSI weak → pullback short

name: Dry sell-climax fade
desc: Bear stack; sharp 5b sell; RSI washed; vol dry → snapback long

name: Dry buy-climax fade
desc: Bull stack; sharp 5b pump; RSI hot; vol dry → snapback short

name: Vol-climax snapback
desc: Deep selloff + vol climax + 5-bar reclaim → long mean-rev

name: Upthrust fade
desc: Overextended rally + vol spike + 5-bar fail → short

name: Bull-range thrust
desc: Bull stack + RSI bull-range + fresh impulse → long continuation

name: Bear-range slip
desc: Bear stack + RSI bear-range + fresh impulse → short continuation

name: Neutral reclaim breakout
desc: Mixed stack + above EMA200 + impulse + vol confirm → long

name: Rally-fail divergence proxy
desc: 20-bar rally + RSI lag + 5-bar rollover → short

name: Capitulation absorption
desc: ret20 dump + ret5 reclaim + vol

name: Blowoff absorption
desc: ret20 pump + ret5 rollover + vol

name: Mixed-stack upside break
desc: neutral EMA → upside vol break

name: Mixed-stack downside break
desc: neutral EMA → downside vol break

name: Bear-stack squeeze
desc: bear regime + EMA20 reclaim

name: Bull-stack failure
desc: bull regime + EMA20 loss

name: 200 reclaim/inverted
desc: Close  EMA200 while  EMA50; dump tail + vol - regime-flip long.

name: 200 loss/inverted
desc: Close  EMA200 while  EMA50; rally tail + vol - regime-flip short.

name: quiet bull coil
desc: Bull stack + neutral RSI + dry vol - drift/coil continuation.

name: quiet bear coil
desc: Bear stack + neutral RSI + dry vol - downside drift continuation.

name: selloff decel
desc: 20b dump, 5b flat, RSI not dead, no vol chase - divergence-proxy long.

name: pump decel
desc: 20b pump, 5b flat, RSI cooling, no vol chase - divergence-proxy short.

name: Capitulation deeper RSI
desc: Direct deepening of the one proven survivor (RSI22 + vol_ratio=1.8): stricter RSI floor, same volume footprint. Tests whether the edge is monotone in oversold d

name: Capitulation deeper on both axes
desc: RSI18 + 2.5x volume — the 2/3/4x volume grid from the curupira cascade-fade evidence, applied to the proven family.

name: Consecutive-down capitulation ladder
desc: Connors consecutive-down-closes lineage (K=5) + oversold + volume footprint so the streak is forced selling, not drift-down chop.

name: Capitulation bar fade with absorption
desc: Exact parameterization from harvest: bar = -2.5 ATR, volume = 3x avg, close in top 40% of range (lower-wick rejection). Closest cousin of the live edge with wic

name: Deep fast 24h drawdown dip
desc: Drawdown-from-high ladder: =4% off the 24h high with volume footprint and oversold — the recency+volume qualifiers that the Quantpedia MIN OOS failure says are

name: 20-bar low sweep and intra-bar reclaim
desc: Pierce of 20-bar low (brkdn20 fired) but bar closes in top 40% of its range on 2x volume = stop-hunt harvested and rejected within the bar. Mechanically testabl

name: Oversold + extreme negative funding squeeze
desc: Late shorts crowding an already-flushed market: RSI25 while funding z=-2 with absolute floor -0.01%/8h (z-floor combo per CoinAPI/QuantJourney construction). Ne

name: Extreme funding contrarian short
desc: Fade funding = +0.10%/8h (Zipmex 'extreme, rarely lasts 24h') confirmed by z=2 so we only fade regime-relative extremes.

name: Funding z-score fade with momentum confirm
desc: Z=2 with the +0.03%/8h absolute floor (prevents fading trivial funding in quiet regimes) plus RSI=60 so price is actually extended.

name: Negative funding + price flush contrarian
desc: Funding = -0.05%/8h while price fell =3% over 20 bars — the harvest's 'extreme negative funding after a flush = squeeze fuel' with its own stated thresholds.

name: Negative-funding breakout continuation
desc: Spot-led rally: price breaks 20-bar high while funding = 0 (shorts still paying = crowded shorts as fuel). Robot Wealth breakout feature x funding sign.

name: Oversold in higher-TF uptrend (Connors port)
desc: RSI=25 only when 4h EMA state is bullish — the trend-filter-first Connors structure ported with rsi14 (no RSI2 in feature set). Strong daily-equity evidence, un

name: Low-vol regime mean reversion
desc: ATR% = 0.6 (quiet regime) with price stretched =1.5% below EMA20 (~2.5 ATR) and oversold — mean-revert-in-low-vol side of the regime-flip hypothesis.

name: High-vol regime breakout
desc: Momentum-in-high-vol side of the same regime flip: ATR% = 1.2 + 20-bar breakout + volume. Deliberately the sign-opposite hypothesis to lowvol_snapback — the lab

name: RVOL 1.5-2.0 band quality breakout
desc: Breakout with volume in the moderate band only (skip 2x extremes per the RVOL-band claim) plus marubozu-quality close (body top 30%). Two independent quality fi

name: Quality breakdown short
desc: Mirror: 20-bar low break, close in bottom 30% of bar, volume confirm, bearish EMA stack. Symmetric falsification of the close-location filter.

name: Multi-TF aligned breakout
desc: 20-bar breakout only when 15m EMA stack AND 4h EMA state agree bullish — the multi-timeframe confirmation gate from the FMZ/BuildAlpha family, without the untes

name: Compression-base breakout
desc: NR/Crabel compression precondition translated to available features: tight 20-bar range (=2%) then breakout with volume. Crabel folklore + BuildAlpha OR/ATR gat

name: Extended up-streak blowoff fade
desc: 6+ consecutive green closes + RSI=75 + 2x volume = extension-then-spike exhaustion structure from the extreme-spike fade; short side of the streak ladder.

name: Green expansion-bar fade
desc: Fade a +2.5 ATR green bar on 3x volume into overbought. Mesfin shows fade direction is statistically right but friction-capped on MNQ — crypto 15m vol vs 0.08%

name: 21-23 UTC seasonality long, trend-gated
desc: Quantpedia BTC evening-hour window with their own improvement (only in uptrend, proxied by ema4h_state==1), generalized across 203 coins. 16-bar timeout oversho

name: Sunday 23:00 UTC re-entry hour
desc: The single hourly window the 'Monday effect' collapses into (US retail re-entry Sunday evening ET). One entry/week/coin; needs dow feature.

name: Dip-in-uptrend (structure pullback)
desc: Above EMA200 (structural uptrend) + =3% off 24h high + 3 consecutive red closes — the buy-pullback-not-fresh-low structure that survived where naive MIN(10) fai

name: Selloff reclaim
desc: ret20 dump + ret5 reclaim + RSI mid + vol confirm

name: Rally rejection
desc: ret20 pump + ret5 fade + RSI slip + vol confirm

name: EMA200 reclaim
desc: neutral stack + 200 reclaim + impulse + vol

name: EMA200 loss
desc: neutral stack + 200 loss + impulse + vol

name: Dry flush
desc: below EMA20, not too far EMA50, low vol, RSI floor

name: Dry squeeze
desc: above EMA20, not too far EMA50, low vol, RSI cap

name: Volume-confirmed bull-stack breakout
desc: Fresh 20-bar high inside a clean bullish EMA stack on a 2x volume surge, RSI not yet blown off — textbook volume-confirmed continuation breakout.

name: Coiled-range squeeze breakout
desc: Volatility contraction resolves up: a tight 20-bar range breaks the prior high on 1.8x volume and closes near the high — coiled-spring squeeze breakout.

name: Multi-timeframe 4h-aligned breakout
desc: 15m breaks a new 20-bar high while the 4h trend is bullish and price holds above EMA50 — trade the breakout with the higher-timeframe tailwind.

name: Range-expansion thrust breakout
desc: An outlier up-bar (1.5x ATR) makes a new 20-bar high and closes at the top of its range inside a bull stack — institutional range-expansion thrust.

name: Early unextended breakout
desc: Catch the breakout at the base, not chasing: new 20-bar high on 2x volume while price is still within 1.5% of EMA20 — enter before the parabolic candle.

name: Negative-funding squeeze breakout
desc: Volume-backed 20-bar-high breakout in an uptrend while perp funding is negative (shorts crowded) — the break forces short covering into fuel.

name: Consecutive-streak momentum breakout
desc: At least three consecutive up-bars drive a new 20-bar high on 1.5x volume — trend-day continuation with buying pressure already in gear.

name: Failed-breakout distribution fade
desc: Up-move exhaustion: after an 8%+ rally an overbought bar (RSI78) with crowded longs (funding z1.5) closes in the lower third — upper-wick distribution, fade the

name: um_vol_brk_01
desc: Fresh close above the prior 20-bar high on a 2x volume surge while the bull EMA stack holds — textbook breakout continuation with room below overbought.

name: um_ema20_pb_02
desc: Strong 20-bar up-move that pulled back to hug the EMA20 while still above the EMA200 — buy the shallow dip inside an established uptrend, not a naked dip.

name: um_stack_ride_03
desc: Bull EMA stack with a strong 20-bar move and RSI parked in the 55-70 trending zone — ride the meat of the trend before it gets overbought.

name: um_thrust_04
desc: Sharp 5-bar impulse closing in the top third of its range on 2x volume, above the mid EMA — aggressive buyers stepping in; momentum tends to persist.

name: um_htf_align_05
desc: 4h trend up AND 15m momentum above the mid EMA with a strong 20-bar move — both timeframes agree, the highest-probability continuation regime.

name: um_streak_06
desc: Four or more consecutive up-closes still finishing near their highs above the fast EMA — relentless one-way demand favors another push before exhaustion.

name: um_4h_cross_07
desc: A just-formed 4h bullish EMA cross with price above the 15m EMA200 — enter early into a new higher-timeframe up-leg.

name: um_climax_short_08
desc: After a parabolic 24h rally into extreme RSI with crowded-long funding, a bar closing in its lower third signals buyer exhaustion — fade the blow-off.

name: um_pb_ema20_01
desc: Textbook trend pullback: in a bullish EMA stack, price dips just below the fast EMA20 (shallow, not broken) while RSI cools to the low-40s — buy the dip, trend

name: um_pb_ema50_02
desc: Deeper higher-timeframe dip: price pulls all the way back to the EMA50 support band with the 4h trend still bullish and EMA stack bullish — buy the retest of th

name: um_pb_reclaim_03
desc: Reclaim wick: bar dips below EMA20 in a bull stack but closes in the upper third of its range (buyers defending) with RSI still moderate — dip bought, reversal

name: um_pb_flag_04
desc: Bull flag: a sharp short-term pullback (ret5 negative) inside a strong 20-bar uptrend (ret20 well positive) with bullish stack — buy the flag consolidation for

name: um_pb_volflush_05
desc: Seller-exhaustion flush: a high-volume spike drives price below EMA20 in a bull stack but the bar closes off its lows — capitulation of the dip, buyers absorbin

name: um_pb_shallow_06
desc: Shallow dip near highs: price is only 1.5-5% off the 96-bar high (uptrend barely interrupted) and sitting at/just below the fast EMA in a bull stack — buy the s

name: um_pb_funding_07
desc: Funding-reset dip: the pullback below EMA20 washes perp funding to negative/depressed (funding_z low) while the bull stack holds — over-leveraged longs flushed,

name: um_pb_streak_08
desc: Down-bar exhaustion: three or more consecutive red bars flush price below EMA20 in a bull stack with RSI cooled to sub-50 — pullback momentum spent, mean-revert

name: Volume breakout to new highs
desc: 3x+ volume bar closing near its high while breaking to a fresh 20-bar high — institutional demand shock powering a confirmed breakout.

name: Accumulation spring off 24h base
desc: Deep in the 24h range, a 2.5x volume up-thrust closing strong signals smart-money accumulation / Wyckoff spring off support.

name: Trend-continuation volume thrust
desc: Bullish EMA stack aligned with the 4h uptrend plus a volume surge closing strong = institutions adding on trend continuation.

name: Clean-funding spot accumulation
desc: Volume surge with strong close and 5-bar momentum while funding stays neutral — genuine spot-driven accumulation, not crowded leverage.

name: Compression-release squeeze breakout
desc: Volume expansion out of a compressed 20-bar range, closing strong above the range high — coiled-spring squeeze breakout.

name: Multi-bar accumulation footprint
desc: Three-plus up closes with volume expansion above the 50 EMA — a multi-bar accumulation footprint of persistent buying.

name: Buying-climax distribution short
desc: After an extended 24h rally, a climactic volume spike that fails to hold (weak close) while stretched above EMA20 — buying-climax / distribution upthrust.

name: um_align_pullback_01
desc: Pullback-in-uptrend: full bull stack above EMA200, price tags the fast EMA20 (0.5% above) with RSI still 48 - buy trend-continuation at value support.

name: um_align_brkout_02
desc: Trend breakout: full bull alignment closes at a fresh 20-bar high (+0.15%) on a 1.8x volume surge - continuation ignition out of the range.

name: um_align_thrust_03
desc: Thrust-candle continuation: in a bull stack above EMA200 a 1.5-ATR up-bar closes in its top quartile (close_pos0.75) - aggressive buyers pressing the trend.

name: um_align_rsi_regime_04
desc: RSI bull-regime ride: full stack with RSI holding 62 plus a fresh 5-bar push (1.5%) - trend strength to ride, not a fade (RSI stays elevated in real uptrends).

name: um_align_mtf_05
desc: Multi-timeframe trend-follow: 15m bull stack aligned with the 4h uptrend (ema4h_state==1) and above EMA200, RSI55 - highest-conviction with-the-higher-trend ent

name: um_align_4h_cross_06
desc: Fresh 4h golden cross (ema4h_cross==1) confirmed by a 15m bull stack above EMA200 - disciplined early entry into a new higher-timeframe uptrend.

name: um_align_streak_07
desc: Momentum persistence: 4+ consecutive green closes inside a bull stack above EMA200 with a 2% 5-bar push - strong hands accumulating, ride the continuation.

name: um_align_exhaust_08
desc: Up-move exhaustion fade: parabolic rally (15% off the 24h low) stretches price 6% above EMA20 with RSI80 and crowded funding (z2) - short the overextension for

name: Momentum-flag pullback
desc: Clean bull EMA stack with strong 5h trend; buy the shallow 5-bar dip that still holds above RSI 45 - flag pullback in an uptrend.

name: Up-streak persistence
desc: Four-plus consecutive green closes with strong 5h momentum off the base, RSI not yet blow-off (80) - ride the sustained trend.

name: 4h-aligned continuation
desc: Higher-timeframe 4h trend bullish, price above EMA50 with a fresh up-streak and 5h momentum - lower-TF continuation with the big trend.

name: Institutional markup bar
desc: An outsized bar (1.5 ATR) closing in the top 15% of its range that makes a new 20-bar high during an active rally - mark-up continuation.

name: Volume 200-EMA reclaim
desc: Price reclaims the 200-EMA on volume with 5h momentum after a 24h-low base - regime flip / early trend continuation.

name: Funding-light sustainable trend
desc: Strong rally and 5h momentum while perp funding stays neutral (2bps) - spot-led demand, longs not yet crowded, room to run.

name: Blow-off top exhaustion fade
desc: Parabolic 24h extension (25%) with RSI80 and crowded funding (5bps) but a weak lower-range close - buyers exhausted, fade the top.

name: Stacked-EMA trend pullback
desc: Textbook trend pullback: buy a shallow RSI dip while EMAs are fully stacked bull (2050200) and price holds above the 200-EMA.

name: Volume capitulation flush
desc: Capitulation flush: in an uptrend, buy a heavy-volume RSI washout bar that closes in its upper half (demand absorbing panic supply).

name: Rising 50-EMA re-entry
desc: Re-entry at the rising 50-EMA: buy a controlled pullback that tags the 50-EMA support band while the 200-trend stays up.

name: 4h/15m dip alignment
desc: Multi-timeframe alignment: with the 4h trend up and price above the 200-EMA, buy a low-30s 15m RSI dip riding the higher-timeframe tailwind.

name: First pullback post-rally
desc: First pullback after strength: following a big 96-bar rally, buy the first ~4%+ dip as RSI cools into the 30s — proven demand buys dips.

name: Momentum pullback ret20+/ret5-
desc: Momentum pullback: 20-bar momentum still clearly positive while the last 5 bars dip and RSI cools into the 30s — buy the pause inside an uptrend.

name: Down-streak exhaustion
desc: Down-streak exhaustion: in a non-bearish structure above the 200-EMA, fade a 4+ consecutive-bar selloff as RSI dips into the mid-30s.

name: Negative-funding flush
desc: Positioning reset: negative funding during an RSI dip in a 4h+200-EMA uptrend means longs got flushed and shorts crowd — fade the flush long.

name: Wide-range expansion bar breakout
desc: A statistically outsized bar closes at its highs and prints a fresh 20-bar high — textbook range-expansion breakout igniting an impulse leg.

name: Volume-confirmed expansion thrust
desc: Outsized bar backed by a 2x+ volume surge closing strong with momentum already turning up — real participation starting a leg.

name: ATR regime expansion
desc: Jump into an elevated-ATR regime while 5-bar momentum is strongly up and close is firm — volatility regime shift in the bulls' favor.

name: Squeeze-release breakout
desc: After a tight 20-bar range, a high-z bar breaks the range high closing strong — compression-to-expansion squeeze release, the cleanest expansion signal.

name: Trend-aligned expansion continuation
desc: In a full bullish EMA stack, a fresh expansion bar closes strong while still near EMA20 — trend re-acceleration entered before the move over-extends.

name: 4h-aligned 15m expansion thrust
desc: 4h uptrend plus a 15m expansion thrust with above-average volume — multi-timeframe-aligned impulse leg.

name: Momentum ignition off 24h base
desc: Early in a rally off the 24h low (not yet extended), an expansion bar with rising momentum closes strong — catch the ignition, don't chase.

name: HTF trend 20-bar breakout
desc: 4h uptrend: buy a 15m 20-bar-high breakout confirmed by a volume surge and a strong close (trend-aligned breakout continuation).

name: HTF trend ema20 reclaim
desc: 4h uptrend: buy the fresh reclaim of the 15m ema20 after a pullback that held above ema50 (buy the pullback, not the extension).

name: HTF stacked-trend RSI pullback
desc: 4h uptrend with 15m EMAs stacked bull: buy the shallow RSI pullback (30-45) — a dip within an intact trend, not an oversold crash.

name: HTF trend momentum ignition
desc: 4h uptrend: buy a momentum-ignition bar — a 2% 5-bar thrust on 2x volume closing near the high (trend-day continuation).

name: Fresh 4h bull cross entry
desc: Fresh 4h bullish EMA cross: enter the early-stage trend once 15m price holds above ema20 on above-average volume (regime change).

name: HTF trend compression breakout
desc: 4h uptrend + tight 20-bar range: buy the volatility-expansion breakout above the range on rising volume (coiled-spring release).

name: HTF trend pullback reversal bar
desc: 4h uptrend, price above ema50: buy the reversal bar that ends a 3+ bar pullback with a strong close (with-trend continuation).

name: Up-move exhaustion blow-off fade
desc: Up-move exhaustion fade: 4h still bull but rally extended 30% from base with crowded funding and a rejection close — short the blow-off.
